findings.summary: RepositoryRecoveryCoordinator is instantiated in startWorkerDrainLoop without its operationalRecovery and worktreeRecovery ports.
findings.suggested_fix: Add the operationalRecovery and worktreeRecovery ports (and other optional parameters like checkPid and registryWorkerHostname) to WorkerLoopDeps, and pass them to RepositoryRecoveryCoordinator in startWorkerDrainLoop.
